title: DF76-901
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''DF76-901''' was a [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] that detailed the [[Yevetha]]n [[Aramadia-class thrustship|''Aramadia''-class thrustship]]. It was appended to datafile [[DF76-882]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-XX -->''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]''
